Bash(node dist/cli.js eval --profile profile-3 --script "\(function\(\){var host=document.querySelector\('wui-editor'\);var root=host.shadowRoot;var img=root.querySelector\('img'\);var R={};R.initialParent=img.parentElement.tagName;root.__activeImage=img;var p=img.parentElement;if\(p.tagName==='P'\){p.parentNode.insertBefore\(img,p\);p.remove\(\);}var ul=document.createElement\('ul'\);ul.id='bullet-wrapper';ul.className='list-inside list-disc ml-6';img.parentNode.insertBefore\(ul,img\);var li=document.createElement\('li'\);ul.appendChild\(li\);li.appendChild\(img\);img.style.display='inline';img.style.verticalAlign='top';R.round1_on_parent=img.parentElement.tagName;var el=img.closest\('ul[id=\\"bullet-wrapper\\"]'\);if\(el\){var exLi=img.parentElement;el.parentNode.insertBefore\(img,el\);exLi.remove\(\);if\(el.children.length===0\)el.remove\(\);}R.round1_off_parentBeforeFix=img.parentElement.tagName;R.round1_off_isRoot=img.parentElement.hasAttribute\('data-editor-root'\);if\(img.parentElement&&img.parentElement.hasAttribute\('data-editor-root'\)\){var np=document.createElement\('p'\);img.parentElement.insertBefore\(np,img\);np.appendChild\(img\);}R.round1_off_parentAfterFix=img.parentElement.tagName;var p2=img.parentElement;if\(p2.tagName==='P'\){p2.parentNode.insertBefore\(img,p2\);p2.remove\(\);}var ul2=document.createElement\('ul'\);ul2.id='bullet-wrapper';ul2.className='list-inside list-disc ml-6';img.parentNode.insertBefore\(ul2,img\);var li2=document.createElement\('li'\);ul2.appendChild\(li2\);li2.appendChild\(img\);R.round2_on_parent=img.parentElement.tagName;R.round2_on_ulId=img.closest\('ul'\).id;var er=root.querySelector\('[data-editor-root]'\);R.editorDirectChildCount=er.children.length;R.editorOnlyChildIsUL=er.children.length===1&&er.children[0].tagName==='UL';return JSON.stringify\(R\);}\)\(\)")

Bash(node dist/cli.js eval --profile profile-3 --script "\(function\(\){var root=document.querySelector\('wui-editor'\).shadowRoot;var tds=root.querySelectorAll\('td'\);var result=[];for\(var i=0;i<tds.length;i++\){result.push\({index:i,text:tds[i].textContent?.substring\(0,30\)||'',offsetHeight:tds[i].offsetHeight,offsetWidth:tds[i].offsetWidth,hasTwoLines:tds[i].offsetHeight>25}\);}return JSON.stringify\(result\);}\)\(\)")

Bash(node dist/cli.js eval --profile profile-3 --script "\(function\(\){var root=document.querySelector\('wui-editor'\).shadowRoot;var td=root.querySelector\('td'\);var textNode=td.firstChild;var sel=root.getSelection\(\);var range=document.createRange\(\);range.setStart\(textNode,0\);range.setEnd\(textNode,5\);sel.removeAllRanges\(\);sel.addRange\(range\);var blockParent=getBlockParentWrapper\(range\);return{blockTag:blockParent?.tagName,blockClasses:blockParent?.className,blockStyle:blockParent?.getAttribute\('style'\)};function getBlockParentWrapper\(r\){var current=r.commonAncestorContainer;var blockTags=['P','H1','H2','H3','H4','H5','H6','LI','BLOCKQUOTE','PRE','TD','TH'];while\(current\){if\(current instanceof HTMLElement\){if\('editorRoot' in current.dataset\)return null;if\(blockTags.includes\(current.tagName\)\)return current;}current=current.parentNode;}return null;}}\)\(\)")

Bash(node dist/cli.js eval --profile profile-3 --script "\(\(\)=>{const host=document.querySelector\('wui-editor'\);const shadow=host?.shadowRoot;const toolbar=shadow?.querySelector\('.editor-toolbar'\);const surface=shadow?.querySelector\('[data-editor-root]'\);if\(!toolbar||!surface\)return'not found';const tr=toolbar.getBoundingClientRect\(\);const sr=surface.getBoundingClientRect\(\);const siteHeader=document.querySelector\('h1'\);const pageBox=document.querySelector\('.container'\);const pageRect=pageBox?.getBoundingClientRect\(\);return{parentHost:host?.getBoundingClientRect\(\),toolbarPos:{t:tr.top,l:tr.left,b:tr.bottom,h:tr.height,w:tr.width},surfacePos:{t:sr.top,h:sr.height,w:sr.width},pageTop:pageRect?.top,siteHeaderRect:siteHeader?.getBoundingClientRect\(\)}}\)\(\)")
